articles.title: Mediators still seek to bridge US, Iran gaps despite failure of face-to-face talks
articles.description: WASHINGTON/ISLAMABAD/DUBAI, April 27 (Reuters) - Work has not halted to bridge gaps between the United States and Iran, sources from mediator Pakistan said, despite the failure of face-to-face diplomacy after President Donald Trump called off a trip by his envoys over the weekend. Iranian sources disclosed Tehran's latest proposal on Monday, which would set aside discussion of Iran's nuclear programme until the war ‌is ended and disputes over shipping from the Gulf are resolved.

articles.title: Is a new era necessary at Turf Moor?
articles.description: As the final whistle went at Turf Moor on Wednesday night, my Dad and I just simply shrugged at each other and walked to the car. Scott Parker's post-match interview was telling, in that there was no mention at all of his fans. It seems futile speculating over likely replacements at this stage - he may well be in the dugout come August - but we are looking at a likely exodus of the current squad, a change in manager and only Kyle Walker pledging his commitment to the Championship campaign.
